metadata.description: Expert Splunk guidance for monitoring, observability, and app development — 8 specialized skills covering the full Splunk ecosystem.

plugins.name: splunk-observability-agent-skill
plugins.description: 8 comprehensive Splunk skills: SPL search optimization, UCC app development, ITSI service modeling, network infrastructure monitoring, OpenTelemetry deployment, Observability Cloud (APM/K8s/RUM), AWS infrastructure monitoring, and Cisco ThousandEyes & Meraki.
